message:
fix(analytics): replace inline onclick with addEventListener (CSP) (#6140)

Address Copilot review comment on the merged PR #6127. Even after the
main analytics script moved to an external file, the Refresh button
still had `onclick="loadData(true)"` inline in analytics.html. The
strict CSP in netlify.toml has `script-src` without `'unsafe-inline'`,
which blocks inline event handlers as well as inline scripts, so
clicks on the Refresh button were silently refused by the browser.

- analytics.html: drop `onclick=`, keep the existing `id="refresh-btn"`
  the JS already references, and add `type="button"`.
- analytics.js: register `refresh-btn` click via `addEventListener`
  alongside the existing `include-localhost` listener.

`npm run build` passes including post-build safety checks.

Fixes #6138

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
